creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 168357
Update to x11/tint

Hello,
the attached svn patch updates x11/tint to version 0.12.7. This is another bugfix release with only a small set of changes. The applications changelog can be found here: https://gitlab.com/o9000/tint2/blob/0.12.7/ChangeLog

Changes to the port are:
* Just the version bump

This updated was tested with poudriere on FreeBSD 9.3, 10.1 and 10.2. And I've used the new version for 48 hours on my desktop.
